title.romaji: Shakugan no Shana Special: Koi to Onsen no Kougai Gakushuu!
title.english: Shakugan no Shana: Koi to Onsen no Kougai Gakushuu!
title.native: 灼眼のシャナ 特別編 恋と温泉の校外学習！
synonyms: Shakugan no Shana Tokubetsu Hen Koi to Onsen no Kougai Gakushuu!
Shakugan no Shana SP: Love and Outdoor Hot Spring Tutorial!
Shana: Love and Outdoor Hot Spring Tutorial!
ชานะ นักรบเนตรอัคคี ความรักและบ่อน้ำพุร้อนกับการทัศนศึกษา
Hoả nhãn của Shana: Chuyến ngoại khoá suối nước nóng
Shakugan no Shana: Trip Luar Sekolah ke Kolam Air Panas Cinta

synopsis: Yuji and Shana's class go on a trip to see various temples and shrines, followed by a trip to a hot springs resort. During the trip, Matake Ogata tries to tell Eita Tanaka her feelings for him, but various complications and hijinks occur that prevent her from doing so.
